records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Angel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Angel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Angel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe what you said was right after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe what you said was right after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe what you said was right after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I see...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I see...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I see...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those armaments and wings... Are they modeled after the Demon Lord of Machinery?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those armaments and wings... Are they modeled after the Demon Lord of Machinery?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those armaments and wings... Are they modeled after the Demon Lord of Machinery?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. I borrowed the angel's form for a bit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. I borrowed the angel's form for a bit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. I borrowed the angel's form for a bit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like you said, I don't really have anything of my own...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like you said, I don't really have anything of my own...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like you said, I don't really have anything of my own...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But that means I can become anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But that means I can become anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But that means I can become anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You really are like me, Personification of Sephira.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You really are like me, Personification of Sephira.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You really are like me, Personification of Sephira.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You reached the threshold of Divinity, yet even now, you're still imitating others.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You reached the threshold of Divinity, yet even now, you're still imitating others.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You reached the threshold of Divinity, yet even now, you're still imitating others.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, we're both just puppets of fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, we're both just puppets of fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, we're both just puppets of fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everything in this world feels like one giant, cold machine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everything in this world feels like one giant, cold machine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everything in this world feels like one giant, cold machine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe everything was already decided by the law of creating a world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe everything was already decided by the law of creating a world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe everything was already decided by the law of creating a world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. I'm human.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. I'm human.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. I'm human.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And humans live with help from others.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And humans live with help from others.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And humans live with help from others.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay to reach out when you're struggling. There's nothing shameful about that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay to reach out when you're struggling. There's nothing shameful about that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay to reach out when you're struggling. There's nothing shameful about that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if you receive help, you have to return it someday.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if you receive help, you have to return it someday.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if you receive help, you have to return it someday.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mina, Amy, F959licette, and Laika... they all came here to save me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mina, Amy, F959licette, and Laika... they all came here to save me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mina, Amy, F959licette, and Laika... they all came here to save me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I want to repay them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I want to repay them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I want to repay them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's what a <color=#ffd34c>bond</color> is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's what a <color=#ffd34c>bond</color> is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's what a <color=#ffd34c>bond</color> is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Back off, Swan!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Back off, Swan!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Back off, Swan!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't let you get anywhere near Noelle again...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't let you get anywhere near Noelle again...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't let you get anywhere near Noelle again...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...! Still clinging on, Wolf...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...! Still clinging on, Wolf...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...! Still clinging on, Wolf...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Swan! Look at me...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Swan! Look at me...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Swan! Look at me...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't let your guard down...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't let your guard down...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't let your guard down...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Firstwing...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Firstwing...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Firstwing...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Told you, didn't I? I was gonna land one clean hit on that smug face of yours...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Told you, didn't I? I was gonna land one clean hit on that smug face of yours...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Told you, didn't I? I was gonna land one clean hit on that smug face of yours...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I think now's the perfect time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I think now's the perfect time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I think now's the perfect time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well...! Looks like the retriever's dreaming big today...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well...! Looks like the retriever's dreaming big today...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well...! Looks like the retriever's dreaming big today...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, actress! You didn't forget about us, did you?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, actress! You didn't forget about us, did you?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, actress! You didn't forget about us, did you?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stay sharp, Laika.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stay sharp, Laika.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stay sharp, Laika.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is Swan we're dealing with. Who knows what tricks she's still hiding.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is Swan we're dealing with. Who knows what tricks she's still hiding.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is Swan we're dealing with. Who knows what tricks she's still hiding.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. For believing in me all the way to the end...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. For believing in me all the way to the end...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. For believing in me all the way to the end...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Meeting Mina...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Meeting Mina...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Meeting Mina...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And learning that everything I had was actually fake...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And learning that everything I had was actually fake...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And learning that everything I had was actually fake...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe just like you said, angel, everything really was decided from the start.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe just like you said, angel, everything really was decided from the start.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe just like you said, angel, everything really was decided from the start.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, you really are interesting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, you really are interesting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, you really are interesting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But this place is my Qlipha domain, the Theater of Memories.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But this place is my Qlipha domain, the Theater of Memories.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But this place is my Qlipha domain, the Theater of Memories.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And in this theater, none of you can defeat me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And in this theater, none of you can defeat me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And in this theater, none of you can defeat me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How the mirror image...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How the mirror image...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How the mirror image...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're wrong, Swan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're wrong, Swan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're wrong, Swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can't win.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can't win.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can't win.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Personification... of Sephira...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Personification... of Sephira...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Personification... of Sephira...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But even so... I'm not going to run anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But even so... I'm not going to run anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But even so... I'm not going to run anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll face it. I'll think it through.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll face it. I'll think it through.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll face it. I'll think it through.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What I truly want.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What I truly want.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What I truly want.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why I exist in this world...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why I exist in this world...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why I exist in this world...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Light and shadow, order and chaos, creation and destruction...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Light and shadow, order and chaos, creation and destruction...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Light and shadow, order and chaos, creation and destruction...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Qlipha Imaginary Energy and Sephira Divinity Energy are two sides of the same coin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Qlipha Imaginary Energy and Sephira Divinity Energy are two sides of the same coin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Qlipha Imaginary Energy and Sephira Divinity Energy are two sides of the same coin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just as you used the Qlipha Imaginary Energy to shape a domain that reflected your will.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just as you used the Qlipha Imaginary Energy to shape a domain that reflected your will.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just as you used the Qlipha Imaginary Energy to shape a domain that reflected your will.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I inverted that domain and created a <color=#ffd34c>world</color> of my own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I inverted that domain and created a <color=#ffd34c>world</color> of my own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I inverted that domain and created a <color=#ffd34c>world</color> of my own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sephira Divinity Energy...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sephira Divinity Energy...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sephira Divinity Energy...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then this really is the moment an angel descends upon this land.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then this really is the moment an angel descends upon this land.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then this really is the moment an angel descends upon this land.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swan...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swan...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now I'll show you my world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now I'll show you my world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now I'll show you my world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan's Qlipha domain just vanished in an instant...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swan's Qlipha domain just vanished in an instant...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swan's Qlipha domain just vanished in an instant...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is this place...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is this place...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is this place...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This scenery...? Did Noelle really create all this...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This scenery...? Did Noelle really create all this...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This scenery...? Did Noelle really create all this...?

records.m_Talk_FRA: This landscape... It's unmistakable. It's the <color=#ffd34c>golden dawn</color>...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The very first view, before all the worlds splintered into countless parallel paths...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The very first view, before all the worlds splintered into countless parallel paths...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The very first view, before all the worlds splintered into countless parallel paths...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The first view...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The first view...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The first view...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're telling me this is what the world looked like when it first began?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're telling me this is what the world looked like when it first began?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're telling me this is what the world looked like when it first began?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Swan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Swan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the world I created, there's only <color=#ffd34c>one</color> law.

records.m_Talk_FRA: In the world I created, there's only <color=#ffd34c>one</color> law.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Swan, you can never achieve victory.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Swan, you can never achieve victory.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Swan, you can never achieve victory.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what power you use, no matter what schemes you come up with...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what power you use, no matter what schemes you come up with...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what power you use, no matter what schemes you come up with...

records.m_Talk_ENG: In this world, you can't win against anyone or anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In this world, you can't win against anyone or anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In this world, you can't win against anyone or anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So admit it, Swan.

records.m_Talk_FRA: So admit it, Swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Admit your defeat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Admit your defeat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Admit your defeat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hahaha...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hahaha...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hahaha...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, we will see about that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, we will see about that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, we will see about that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it, Swan...! What are you scheming now...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it, Swan...! What are you scheming now...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it, Swan...! What are you scheming now...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just give it up already...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just give it up already...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just give it up already...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mina...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mina...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mina...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everything according to the script.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everything according to the script.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everything according to the script.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is my old determination.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is my old determination.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is my old determination.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what ending awaits me at the end of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what ending awaits me at the end of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what ending awaits me at the end of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A choice I made to accept any role if it meant reverting everything to the beginning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A choice I made to accept any role if it meant reverting everything to the beginning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A choice I made to accept any role if it meant reverting everything to the beginning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, this story should probably end here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew it... I wasn't wrong...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew it... I wasn't wrong...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew it... I wasn't wrong...

records.m_Talk_ENG: To revert all the stories... to their beginning...
records.m_Talk_DEU: To revert all the stories... to their beginning...
records.m_Talk_FRA: To revert all the stories... to their beginning...

records.m_Talk_ENG: She... didn't dodge it...?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Personification of Sephira...! What did you do to me...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Personification of Sephira...! What did you do to me...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, why...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's over.

records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Kgh.

records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...* *Huff...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well. I think I told you before, Noelle Wright.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well. I think I told you before, Noelle Wright.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well. I think I told you before, Noelle Wright.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To save your worthless sympathy for someone else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To save your worthless sympathy for someone else.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To save your worthless sympathy for someone else.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fine. I admit it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it! The heck is she on about?!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait...! Was that all a trick...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you all just gonna stand there!? That damn woman's escaping into the mirror...!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you all just gonna stand there!? That damn woman's escaping into the mirror...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, she's changing back to herself...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, she's changing back to herself...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mina...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mina...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mina...

records.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle, are you okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle, are you okay?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's meet again, on the next stage...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mina...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Noelle...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Noelle...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Noelle...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mina! It's you...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mina! It's you...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mina! It's you...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good morning! I missed you so much!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good morning! I missed you so much!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good morning! I missed you so much!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I kept watching you on the theater screen, but it wasn't the same!

records.m_Talk_FRA: I kept watching you on the theater screen, but it wasn't the same!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing you in real life again is the best! Ehehe!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh...! Really...?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem, definitely not that much!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha! That's okay! Because I missed you enough for both of us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mina.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mina.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mina.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's something I've always wanted to tell you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's something I've always wanted to tell you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's something I've always wanted to tell you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? What is it?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? What is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um... Well...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um... Well...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um... Well...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Mina.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Mina.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Mina.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to your bond... I finally understand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to your bond... I finally understand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to your bond... I finally understand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want to be someone who gives you strength.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want to be someone who gives you strength.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want to be someone who gives you strength.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want to stay by your side from now on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want to stay by your side from now on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want to stay by your side from now on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if everything ends someday...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if everything ends someday...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if everything ends someday...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why the long pause?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why the long pause?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why the long pause?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it something important?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it something important?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it something important?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I like you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I like you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I like you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mina.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mina.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mina.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Angel.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Angel.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Angel.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe what you said was right after all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe what you said was right after all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe what you said was right after all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I see...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I see...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I see...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those armaments and wings... Are they modeled after the Demon Lord of Machinery?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those armaments and wings... Are they modeled after the Demon Lord of Machinery?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those armaments and wings... Are they modeled after the Demon Lord of Machinery?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. I borrowed the angel's form for a bit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. I borrowed the angel's form for a bit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. I borrowed the angel's form for a bit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like you said, I don't really have anything of my own...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like you said, I don't really have anything of my own...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like you said, I don't really have anything of my own...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But that means I can become anything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But that means I can become anything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But that means I can become anything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You really are like me, Personification of Sephira.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You really are like me, Personification of Sephira.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You really are like me, Personification of Sephira.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You reached the threshold of Divinity, yet even now, you're still imitating others.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You reached the threshold of Divinity, yet even now, you're still imitating others.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You reached the threshold of Divinity, yet even now, you're still imitating others.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, we're both just puppets of fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, we're both just puppets of fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, we're both just puppets of fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everything in this world feels like one giant, cold machine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everything in this world feels like one giant, cold machine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everything in this world feels like one giant, cold machine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe everything was already decided by the law of creating a world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe everything was already decided by the law of creating a world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe everything was already decided by the law of creating a world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. I'm human.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. I'm human.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. I'm human.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And humans live with help from others.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And humans live with help from others.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And humans live with help from others.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay to reach out when you're struggling. There's nothing shameful about that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay to reach out when you're struggling. There's nothing shameful about that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay to reach out when you're struggling. There's nothing shameful about that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But if you receive help, you have to return it someday.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But if you receive help, you have to return it someday.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But if you receive help, you have to return it someday.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mina, Amy, F959licette, and Laika... they all came here to save me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mina, Amy, F959licette, and Laika... they all came here to save me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mina, Amy, F959licette, and Laika... they all came here to save me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So I want to repay them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So I want to repay them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So I want to repay them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's what a <color=#ffd34c>bond</color> is.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's what a <color=#ffd34c>bond</color> is.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's what a <color=#ffd34c>bond</color> is.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Back off, Swan!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Back off, Swan!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Back off, Swan!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I won't let you get anywhere near Noelle again...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I won't let you get anywhere near Noelle again...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I won't let you get anywhere near Noelle again...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...! Still clinging on, Wolf...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...! Still clinging on, Wolf...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...! Still clinging on, Wolf...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Swan! Look at me...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Swan! Look at me...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Swan! Look at me...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't let your guard down...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't let your guard down...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't let your guard down...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Firstwing...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Firstwing...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Firstwing...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Told you, didn't I? I was gonna land one clean hit on that smug face of yours...!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Told you, didn't I? I was gonna land one clean hit on that smug face of yours...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I think now's the perfect time!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I think now's the perfect time!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I think now's the perfect time!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well...! Looks like the retriever's dreaming big today...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well...! Looks like the retriever's dreaming big today...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well...! Looks like the retriever's dreaming big today...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, actress! You didn't forget about us, did you?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, actress! You didn't forget about us, did you?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, actress! You didn't forget about us, did you?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stay sharp, Laika.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stay sharp, Laika.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stay sharp, Laika.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is Swan we're dealing with. Who knows what tricks she's still hiding.

root.m_Talk_FRA: This is Swan we're dealing with. Who knows what tricks she's still hiding.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. For believing in me all the way to the end...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. For believing in me all the way to the end...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. For believing in me all the way to the end...

root.m_Talk_ENG: So...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Meeting Mina...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Meeting Mina...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Meeting Mina...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And learning that everything I had was actually fake...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And learning that everything I had was actually fake...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And learning that everything I had was actually fake...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe just like you said, angel, everything really was decided from the start.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe just like you said, angel, everything really was decided from the start.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, you really are interesting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, you really are interesting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, you really are interesting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But this place is my Qlipha domain, the Theater of Memories.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But this place is my Qlipha domain, the Theater of Memories.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But this place is my Qlipha domain, the Theater of Memories.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And in this theater, none of you can defeat me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And in this theater, none of you can defeat me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And in this theater, none of you can defeat me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How the mirror image...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How the mirror image...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How the mirror image...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're wrong, Swan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're wrong, Swan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're wrong, Swan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You can't win.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You can't win.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You can't win.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Personification... of Sephira...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Personification... of Sephira...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But even so... I'm not going to run anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But even so... I'm not going to run anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But even so... I'm not going to run anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll face it. I'll think it through.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll face it. I'll think it through.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll face it. I'll think it through.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What I truly want.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What I truly want.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What I truly want.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why I exist in this world...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why I exist in this world...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why I exist in this world...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Light and shadow, order and chaos, creation and destruction...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Light and shadow, order and chaos, creation and destruction...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Light and shadow, order and chaos, creation and destruction...

root.m_Talk_FRA: Qlipha Imaginary Energy and Sephira Divinity Energy are two sides of the same coin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just as you used the Qlipha Imaginary Energy to shape a domain that reflected your will.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Just as you used the Qlipha Imaginary Energy to shape a domain that reflected your will.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I inverted that domain and created a <color=#ffd34c>world</color> of my own.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I inverted that domain and created a <color=#ffd34c>world</color> of my own.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sephira Divinity Energy...

root.m_Talk_FRA: Sephira Divinity Energy...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then this really is the moment an angel descends upon this land.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then this really is the moment an angel descends upon this land.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swan...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swan...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swan...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now I'll show you my world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now I'll show you my world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now I'll show you my world.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Swan's Qlipha domain just vanished in an instant...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swan's Qlipha domain just vanished in an instant...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is this place...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is this place...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is this place...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This scenery...? Did Noelle really create all this...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This scenery...? Did Noelle really create all this...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This scenery...? Did Noelle really create all this...?

root.m_Talk_FRA: This landscape... It's unmistakable. It's the <color=#ffd34c>golden dawn</color>...

root.m_Talk_DEU: The very first view, before all the worlds splintered into countless parallel paths...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The very first view, before all the worlds splintered into countless parallel paths...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The first view...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The first view...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The first view...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're telling me this is what the world looked like when it first began?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're telling me this is what the world looked like when it first began?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're telling me this is what the world looked like when it first began?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Swan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Swan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Swan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the world I created, there's only <color=#ffd34c>one</color> law.

root.m_Talk_FRA: In the world I created, there's only <color=#ffd34c>one</color> law.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Swan, you can never achieve victory.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Swan, you can never achieve victory.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Swan, you can never achieve victory.</color>

root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what power you use, no matter what schemes you come up with...
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what power you use, no matter what schemes you come up with...

root.m_Talk_ENG: In this world, you can't win against anyone or anything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In this world, you can't win against anyone or anything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In this world, you can't win against anyone or anything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So admit it, Swan.

root.m_Talk_FRA: So admit it, Swan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Admit your defeat.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Admit your defeat.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hahaha...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hahaha...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hahaha...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, we will see about that.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, we will see about that.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it, Swan...! What are you scheming now...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it, Swan...! What are you scheming now...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just give it up already...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just give it up already...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just give it up already...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mina...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mina...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mina...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everything according to the script.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everything according to the script.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everything according to the script.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is my old determination.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is my old determination.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is my old determination.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what ending awaits me at the end of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what ending awaits me at the end of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what ending awaits me at the end of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A choice I made to accept any role if it meant reverting everything to the beginning.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A choice I made to accept any role if it meant reverting everything to the beginning.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A choice I made to accept any role if it meant reverting everything to the beginning.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, this story should probably end here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha...

root.m_Talk_FRA: I knew it... I wasn't wrong...

root.m_Talk_ENG: To revert all the stories... to their beginning...

root.m_Talk_FRA: To revert all the stories... to their beginning...

root.m_Talk_DEU: It's over.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's over.

root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Kgh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well. I think I told you before, Noelle Wright.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well. I think I told you before, Noelle Wright.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well. I think I told you before, Noelle Wright.

root.m_Talk_FRA: To save your worthless sympathy for someone else.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good morning! I missed you so much!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good morning! I missed you so much!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good morning! I missed you so much!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I kept watching you on the theater screen, but it wasn't the same!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I kept watching you on the theater screen, but it wasn't the same!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I kept watching you on the theater screen, but it wasn't the same!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing you in real life again is the best! Ehehe!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing you in real life again is the best! Ehehe!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing you in real life again is the best! Ehehe!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You did great, Noelle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You did great, Noelle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You did great, Noelle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I missed you too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I missed you too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I missed you too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh...! Really...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh...! Really...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh...! Really...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You missed me? That makes me so, so happy!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You missed me? That makes me so, so happy!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You missed me? That makes me so, so happy!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How much? How much did you miss me...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How much? How much did you miss me...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How much? How much did you miss me...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: H-how much...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: H-how much...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: H-how much...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes...! As much as heaven and earth...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes...! As much as heaven and earth...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes...! As much as heaven and earth...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Or maybe... like the universe expanding at seventy-three kilometers per megaparsec...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Or maybe... like the universe expanding at seventy-three kilometers per megaparsec...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Or maybe... like the universe expanding at seventy-three kilometers per megaparsec...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what? That's not even a real comparison...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what? That's not even a real comparison...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what? That's not even a real comparison...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem, definitely not that much!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem, definitely not that much!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem, definitely not that much!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha! That's okay! Because I missed you enough for both of us!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha! That's okay! Because I missed you enough for both of us!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha! That's okay! Because I missed you enough for both of us!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mina.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mina.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mina.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's something I've always wanted to tell you...
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's something I've always wanted to tell you...
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's something I've always wanted to tell you...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? What is it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? What is it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? What is it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Um... Well...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Um... Well...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Um... Well...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Mina.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Mina.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Mina.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to your bond... I finally understand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to your bond... I finally understand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to your bond... I finally understand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I want to be someone who gives you strength.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I want to be someone who gives you strength.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I want to be someone who gives you strength.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I want to stay by your side from now on.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I want to stay by your side from now on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I want to stay by your side from now on.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if everything ends someday...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if everything ends someday...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if everything ends someday...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why the long pause?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why the long pause?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why the long pause?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is it something important?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is it something important?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is it something important?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I like you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I like you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I like you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mina.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mina.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mina.
